title: Enchanced MC
body:
Humongus Minecraft overhaul. Including
- New Villages
- New Biomes
- New World Gen
- New Functional Blocks
- Better Farming
- MANY NEW STRUCTURES
- Better Villagers
- Astronomay
- New Mobs
- Cooking
- The Entire Yung's Mod suite
It is large modpack make sure you have a good amount of storage


EMC is a new way to play Minecraft, it massievly overhauls the game! And makes it enjoyable too! Seasons will come and go and so will hours of your time as you play and enjoy!
**MAKE SURE TO HAVE MINIMUM OF 6GB OF RAM ALLOCATED TO MINECRAFT OTHERWISE YOU WILL LAG HARD**

**Credit to Stardust Labs For Terralith [https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)**
